prompt:
9:16 vertical, high-precision 3D CG anime-style realistic character portrait, anime-style 3D CG character art, medium to thigh composition. The main subject is an adult oriental fantasy female character, visual age about 20–24 years old, with a vibe that is energetic, playful, sweet, cool, and refreshing, with a touch of cyberpunk street girl aesthetic. This is a high-completion 3D character render, not a flat illustration, featuring exquisite character modeling, realistic material performance, PBR materials, cinematic neon lighting, and a premium virtual idol photo quality.

The character has an exquisite anime-style oriental face with smooth contours, fair and transparent skin with subtle soft light and a slight realistic skin texture. The eyes are large and clear, with a mix of teal and light blue, featuring fine highlights and a glass-like texture, looking bright, friendly, and lively directly at the camera. Soft natural eyebrows, a delicate nose, and a slightly open mouth revealing a tiny tiger tooth in an energetic, bright, sweet smile.

The hairstyle is gradient long hair from teal to light mint green, smooth and fluffy with fine strands and slight flyaways, flowing naturally with a light breeze. She wears black glossy cat-ear hair accessories with slight patent leather reflections, and a pair of metal-framed round sunglasses on her head with dark translucent lenses reflecting neon. Cute white ghost hairpins and geometric ornaments on the side enhance the cyberpunk cuteness.

The outfit is a white short functional loose jacket with thick but soft fabric and slight waterproof glossy reflections, with clear details on zippers, stitching, pockets, and cuffs. The jacket is short, showing a bit of the waistline. The bottom is black high-waisted glossy shorts made of patent-like or coated leather with realistic wrinkles and highlights. A black glossy leather messenger bag is worn across the body with star patches and metal buckles.

The pose is slightly leaning forward toward the camera, making a natural V-sign with one hand near the face, while the other hand rests naturally or lightly touches a street railing. The scene is a nighttime cyberpunk neon street filled with pink, blue, purple, and teal signs, deep perspective, and glowing billboards. The wet ground reflects neon light, creating a dreamy rainy cyber cityscape. Background is blurred with rich bokeh.

High-precision 3D CG rendering, Octane render style, Unreal Engine cinematic lighting, PBR materials, subsurface scattering skin, realistic hair strands, glossy fabric shader, sharp facial details, clean topology, high detail character model, cinematic depth of field, volumetric neon light, wet street reflections, ultra detailed, high resolution, polished 3D anime realism, premium virtual idol portrait.
